---
title: "Langley Little Ones: Six Stories by Charlotte M. Yonge"
---

## Langley Little Ones: Six Stories by Charlotte M. Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1882
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Walter Smith (late Mozley), 34 King Street, Covent Garden, London

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
